return(function(C,Y,q,i,E,y,u,A,b,a,p,T,m,N,Q,x,I,P,z,k,t,M)a,b,M,P,k,Q,t,T,I,x,m,A,z,p,N={},function(C)a[C]=a[C]-(-507371+507372)if a[C]==333731-333731 then a[C],N[C]=nil,nil end
